rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:9]>可恶～林克那个混蛋，
不仅把支部搞得一团糟，
还把我们好不容易抓来的裁缝
全都放跑了！
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>支部得负责生产服装啊……
我得在可盖大人发现这件事前做点什么才行……
<unk[3:0:12]><Size=80>不过，只要再去把那些穿着华丽的家伙
抓回来就行了……
反正他们经常在<Color=red>道路<Color=white>上徘徊……<Size=100>
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:9]>可惡～林克那個混蛋，<unk[5:0]>
跑到支部大鬧一場也就算了！
居然還把我們大費周章抓來的裁縫師
全部通通放走！
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>生產服裝可是支部的責任……<unk[5:0]>
得在可蓋大人發現之前想辦法解決才行……
<unk[3:0:12]><Size=80>只要再去把那些裝扮華麗的傢伙
抓回來就行了……
反正他們很常在<Color=red>道路<Color=white>上徘徊……<Size=100>
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:9]>くっそ～ リンクの<Ruby={4:6}やろう>野郎<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:4}しぶ>支部を <Ruby={2:2}あ>荒らしただけでなく
せっかく<Ruby={2:4}つか>捕まえた <Ruby={4:10}しょうぞく>装束の<Ruby={2:4}つく>作り<Ruby={2:2}て>手まで
<Ruby={2:2}に>逃がしやがって！
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]><Ruby={6:14}しょうぞくづく>装束作りも <Ruby={4:4}しぶ>支部の<Ruby={4:6}やくめ>役目…<unk[5:0]>
コーガ<Ruby={2:4}さま>様にバレる<Ruby={2:4}まえ>前に <Ruby={2:4}なん>何とかしないとな…
<unk[3:0:12]><Size=80>まぁ またあの<Ruby={4:4}はで>派手な<Ruby={4:8}かっこう>格好した<Ruby={2:4}やつ>奴らを
<Ruby={2:4}つか>捕まえてくればいいか…
アイツラ <Color=red><Ruby={4:8}かいどう>街道<Color=white>をよく<Ruby={2:4}ある>歩いてっからな…<Size=100>
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:9]>Argh! That wretched Link! Not only did
he break into our branches, but he set all
our tailors free!
We'd only just kidnapped them too...<PageBreak><unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>It's the branches' duty to make our
uniforms. We've gotta fix this before
Master Kohga finds out.
<unk[3:0:12]><Size=80>Well, it shouldn't be too hard to nab those gaudy
seamsters again... They're always walking down
<Color=red>roads<Color=white> without a care in the world.<Size=100>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>支部得负责生产服装……我得在可盖大人
发现之前把那些穿着华丽的家伙抓回来才行……
啧，林克这个混蛋，<unk[5:0]>
给我添了多少麻烦！
<unk[3:0:9]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>你也是，如果看到那些穿着华丽的家伙，
就直接把他们给我抓回来！
他们经常在<Color=red>道路<Color=white>上徘徊的。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>生產服裝可是支部的責任……
得在可蓋大人發現之前想辦法解決才行……
都是林克那個混蛋害的，<unk[5:0]>
居然給我惹出這麼多麻煩來！
<unk[3:0:9]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>如果你也看到那些裝扮華麗的傢伙，
就直接把他們抓回來！
他們很常在<Color=red>道路<Color=white>上徘徊。

<unk[3:0:10]><Ruby={6:14}しょうぞくづく>装束作りも <Ruby={4:4}しぶ>支部の<Ruby={4:6}やくめ>役目… コーガ<Ruby={2:4}さま>様にバレる<Ruby={2:4}まえ>前に
また あの<Ruby={4:4}はで>派手な<Ruby={2:4}やつ>奴らを<Ruby={2:4}つか>捕まえてこないとな…

<Ruby={4:8}めんどう>面倒な<Ruby={4:6}しごと>仕事ばっか <Ruby={2:2}ふ>増やしやがって！
<unk[3:0:9]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>お<Ruby={2:4}まえ>前も あの<Ruby={4:4}はで>派手な<Ruby={4:8}かっこう>格好の<Ruby={2:4}やつ>奴らを<Ruby={2:2}み>見かけたら

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:10]>It's the branches' duty to make our
uniforms, so we have to get those tailors
back before Master Kohga finds out.
That blasted Link.<unk[5:0]> We're busy enough
without having to rekidnap people!

<unk[3:0:9]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>Listen, you. If you see anybody in flashy
clothes, you grab them and bring them
back here!
You can find them walking the<Color=red> roads<Color=white>
outside. Tailors love roads.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>支部得负责生产服装……我得在可盖大人
发现之前把那些穿着华丽的家伙抓回来才行……
……<unk[5:1]>哦不对，<unk[5:2]>
可盖大人已经不在了……<unk[5:2]>
<unk[3:0:9]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>啧，林克这个混蛋，<unk[5:0]>
给我添了多少麻烦！
反正你也是，如果看到那些穿着华丽的家伙，
就直接把他们给我抓回来！
他们经常在<Color=red>道路<Color=white>上徘徊的。

就去把他們抓來！
他們很常在<Color=red>道路<Color=white>上徘徊。

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:10]>It's the branches' duty to make our
uniforms, so we have to get those tailors
back before Master Kohga finds out.
Though...<unk[5:1]>I guess Master Kohga is gone...<unk[5:2]><PageBreak><unk[3:0:9]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>That blasted Link!<unk[5:0]> Could he make any
more trouble for us?!<PageBreak>Listen, you. If you see anybody in flashy
clothes, you grab them and bring them
back here!<PageBreak>You can find them walking the<Color=red> roads<Color=white>
outside. Tailors love roads.

<unk[3:0:7]>Well, if it isn't Link!<unk[5:0]> Huh...<unk[5:0]> I guess it
actually ISN'T Link.

<unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]>All right.<unk[5:0]> Get inside.

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:10]>Outfit making is the branches' duty.
That's why we have to get our tailors
back before Master Kohga finds out!
That accursed Link! <unk[5:0]>We're busy enough
without his meddling.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:7]>Blademaster, if you see anyone dressed
in flashy clothes, please let me know, and
I'll capture them.
You can often find them walking the<Color=red> roads<Color=white>
outside. Tailors love roads.

That's why we have to get our tailors
back before Master Kohga finds out!
Though...<unk[5:1]>I suppose Master Kohga is gone.<unk[5:2]><PageBreak>That accursed Link! <unk[5:0]>It's as if he lives to

I'll capture them.

outside. Tailors love roads.
